root.title: Community | Adon ERP
root.description: Explore learning, services, collaboration, and software access paths across the Adon ERP community.

collaborate.title: Collaborate | Adon ERP Community
collaborate.description: Collaborate with the Adon ERP community through forum discussions, events, translations, GitHub, and partner programs.

collaborateEvents.description: Join Adon ERP community events — webinars, workshops, meetups, and conferences.

collaborateGithub.title: GitHub | Adon ERP Collaborate
collaborateGithub.description: Contribute to Adon ERP on GitHub by shipping pull requests, reviewing code, and collaborating with developers.

collaborateTranslations.title: Community Translations | Adon ERP Collaborate
collaborateTranslations.description: Join the Adon ERP translation community and help make the platform accessible in every language.

collaborateBecomePartner.title: Become a Partner | Adon ERP Community
collaborateBecomePartner.description: Join the Adon ERP Partner Program and grow your implementation, consulting, or reseller business.
